title: Source of payment
doc_html:
§2158.  Source of payment

Said bonds or other obligations shall be payable out of the income, revenue, or funds or avails pledged to the payment thereof as herein provided.
doc_text:
§2158.  Source of payment
Said bonds or other obligations shall be payable out of the income, revenue, or funds or avails pledged to the payment thereof as herein provided.
